sections.paragraph: ἀναξίως [ἀνάξιος] adv. ‘in a manner that does not bring honor’, i.e. without a sense of what brings credit to some entity (the performance of something ἀξιῶς, ‘in a manner worthy’ of one’s city or one’s deity [cp. 1 Th 2:12], was of primary concern in the Greco-Roman world) in dishonoring manner 1 Cor 11:27, 29 v.l.
